findings: Metaswarm launcher creates collab/ with protocol.json plus append-only proposals/reviews/improvements/consensus/broadcasts ledgers before commander start.
Protocol records required fields and explicit propose->peer_review->improve->consensus->broadcast->adopt workflow.
Gap: launcher seeds the collaboration bus but does not validate commanders actually emit required ledger entries or schema-complete records.
Gap: this file does not provide Agent Pulse live counts; monitor wiring is elsewhere.
